CustomField.description: Lookup to the WFM Contract for Contract-specific Invoice Settings. When the related Contract has 'Invoice Source' set to 'Contract', these Invoice Settings will be used for invoicing purposes.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Lookup to the WFM Contract for Contract-specific Invoice Settings. When the related Contract has 'Invoice Source' set to 'Contract', these Invoice Settings will be used for invoicing purposes.
CustomField.label: WFM Contract
